texto: As the hand held before the eye conceals the greatest mountain, so the little earthly life hides from the glance the enormous lights and mysteries of which the world is full, and he who can draw it away from before his eyes, as one draws away a hand, beholds the great shining of the inner worlds.
explicacao: Citação de Rabbi Nachman de Bratslav sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “As the hand held before the eye conceals the greatest mountain, so the little earthly life hides …” articula fe, holiness, mystery em registro de fe, com relevância para contextos como mystery e nature.

frase_original: As the hand held before the eye conceals the greatest mountain, so the little earthly life hides from the glance the enormous lights and mysteries of which the world is full, and he who can draw it away from before his eyes, as one draws away a hand, beholds the great shining of the inner worlds.
